title: machilus pauhoi
intro: Machilus pauhoi, also known as Pauohi or Pauohi Tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to Hawaii, belonging to the laurel family (Lauraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Machilus pauhoi include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and improve respiratory health. Machilus pauhoi is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
